title: NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION - 211info
text: GOBHI TRANSPORTATION SERVICES NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-emergency rides to health care appointments or pharmacy visits. OHP will only pay for travel costs for rides services approved before the appointment or pharmacy visit. Eligibility: OHP members enrolled with Eastern Oregon CCO or OHP Fee-for-Service (Open Card) benefits and enrolled in OHP Plus (BMM, BMH, or BMD) benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (877) 875-4657 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 875-4657 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: OHP card AREA SERVED: Baker, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Hood River, Lake, Malheur, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - TRAVEL HELP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
